markdownRemark.html:
Microsoft’s hosting their Devs4Devs event here in Johannesburg (Bryanston) again!

14 sessions of 20 minutes each from 9AM on – one of which is mine ;). I’ll be running one session showing off the new awesome bits in the new NHibernate 3 Alpha 1 release! So if you’re interested in seeing the full LINQ provider, Loqucious configuration API and NH3’s new killer feature – lazy loading by column – be sure to check this one out!

This will be my first technical presentation, so I’m feeling rather amped up for it!

Check out the official post from Microsoft more details and the agenda for the morning. It’s a free event, free registration, free food and free coffee!
